title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Output Action Rail Grouping
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench friction by grouping the existing /pm-review/import-intake route links and export buttons into a clearer output action rail, while preserving all existing handlers, labels, filenames, export contents, read seams, storage keys, and no-authority boundaries.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Separate route navigation links from local output actions in the Daily Intake Starting Point header.
Group existing export buttons into Review Outputs, Executor Output, Field Prep Outputs, and Refresh.
Preserve the same export button labels, click handlers, disabled states, filenames, and artifact contents.
Add focused smoke coverage proving the grouped action rail exists and contains the same existing output buttons.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar recommended PM Lane 077 as a local output action rail grouping tranche because Lane 076 already delegates hosted parity and the remaining day-to-day friction is the flat top control row. The sidecar recommended preserving existing export behavior and avoiding new authority.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for the grouped action rail.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "selected recipient|handoff created|assigned|scheduled|ready for execution|ready for field|field ready|field log of record|hosted parity proven|approval ready|packet admitted|daily report|tracking system|percent complete|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|dispatched|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
